title: Equity Derivatives Operations- Associate/ AVP
description:
Equity Derivatives Operations- Associate/ AVP

Our client is a global financial services group that provides banking, investment, asset management, and advisory services. They are seeking an Equity Derivatives Operations- Associate/ AVP.

Some of the key responsibilities will include:

· Provide trade support by drafting, reviewing, and managing ISDA confirmations and documentation for OTC Equity Derivatives, Listed Warrants, Securities Lending & Borrowing, and Repo transactions.

· Partner with legal and business teams to support counterparty onboarding and business growth through confirmation template management and MCA negotiations.

· Manage and escalate confirmation disputes and exceptions in a timely manner while mentoring and supporting the documentation team in India.

· Perform manual regulatory trade reporting for equity derivative transactions as required.

To be eligible for this role you will require:

· Over 2 years of relevant experience in financial services documentation or market operations, with exposure to equity derivatives and ISDA confirmations preferred

· Proven ability to maintain high accuracy and attention to detail while working under strict deadlines

· Strong communication skills to coordinate effectively with internal teams and stakeholders

· Proficient in MS Office applications (Excel, Word, Outlook), with experience using automation or robotic tools viewed as an advantage.

Please contact Chezereen Williams by emailing your cv directly in word format with job reference no JOB- 15997 to chezereen@theedgepartnership.com

Please note that due to the high number of applications only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. If you do not hear from us in the next 5 business days we regret to inform you that your application for this position was unsuccessful.

EA License Number: 16S8131

Recruiter License Number: R24121355

postedCompany.description:
We are The Edge

Whether it’s a start-up, a local conglomerate, an international bank or an MNC, our goal is single-minded – to provide clients with the competitive edge needed to source key talents across all aspects of their business. Combined, our partners have over 30 years of experience in sourcing global talent for businesses in Asia.

We partner with those companies and individuals that understand and treasure the value of working closely with their recruitment partners, creating a relationship based upon trust, mutual respect and professionalism.

We offer the leading edge in…

  • developing opportunities for candidates and clients alike across the competitive Asian employment landscape.
  • delivering career opportunities, career management, responsiveness and service levels.
  • creating innovative, imaginative and sometimes unconventional solutions to support our clients’ requirements.
  • providing an internationally-linked market leading database and world class IT support.

We specialize in

  • Banking & Financial Services
  • Commerce & Industry
  • Sales & Marketing
  • Human Resources
  • Information Technology
  • Supply Chain Management

http://theedgeinasia.com/
